idea-plugin.name: Claude Code Commit
idea-plugin.description:
Claude Code Commit brings the Claude CLI into your JetBrains IDE — both for generating commit messages and for feeding file references straight into a Claude Code session running in the terminal.

Features
  • Generate commit messages — a button on the commit panel toolbar sends the files checked for the commit to Claude, which inspects the diffs itself via read-only git commands and fills the generated message into the commit message field. The output language can follow the IDE or be pinned to Chinese/English, and your own prompt is appended to the built-in commit conventions.
  • Copy / Send CC reference — right-click in the editor or the project view (or press Ctrl+Alt+K, Cmd+Alt+K on macOS) to build a Claude Code reference for the current file and selection (@path#Lstart-end) and either copy it to the clipboard or type it into the terminal.
    Send types the reference into only the currently active terminal tab. This deliberately differs from the official Claude Code [Beta] plugin, whose shortcut broadcasts the reference to every open Claude session at once — so you can keep several Claude sessions side by side and reference a file into exactly the one you mean.
  • Auto-open Claude Code — when you send a reference and no terminal is open, a new terminal is created, the Claude CLI is launched in it, and the reference is typed in automatically (on by default; can be turned off).
  • Bilingual UI — the interface and settings follow the IDE display language (English or Simplified Chinese).
  • Close terminal on project open — an optional convenience that hides a terminal restored from the previous session, whose shell is already gone.
Configurable under Settings > Tools > Claude Code Commit (Claude CLI path, API URL/key, model, timeout, custom prompt, and the terminal options above). The CC reference and auto-open features require the bundled Terminal plugin. Requires IDE 2025.3.6 or newer.
Claude Code Commit 把 Claude CLI 集成进你的 JetBrains IDE——既能生成 Git 提交消息, 也能把文件引用直接送进终端里运行的 Claude Code 会话。

功能
  • 生成提交消息——提交面板工具栏上的一个按钮,把本次勾选提交的文件交给 Claude, 它自己用只读的 git 命令查看差异,并把生成的消息填回提交消息框。输出语言可跟随 IDE,也可固定 为中文/英文;你的自定义提示词会追加在内置的提交约定之后。
  • 复制 / 发送 CC 引用——在编辑器或项目视图中右键(或按 Ctrl+Alt+K,macOS 为 Cmd+Alt+K),为当前文件与选区生成 Claude Code 引用(@path#Lstart-end),复制到 剪贴板或输入到终端。
    发送只会把引用输入到当前激活的终端标签页。这一点有意区别于官方的 Claude Code [Beta] 插件——后者的快捷键会把引用同时广播到所有已打开的 Claude 会话; 因此你可以并排开多个 Claude 会话,把文件引用精确发送到你想要的那一个。
  • 自动打开 Claude Code——发送引用时如果没有打开的终端,会自动新建终端、在其中启动 Claude CLI,并把引用输入进去(默认开启,可关闭)。
  • 中英双语界面——界面与设置跟随 IDE 显示语言(英文或简体中文)。
  • 打开项目时关闭终端——一个可选的便捷项,隐藏从上次会话恢复、其 shell 已不存在的 空终端。
可在 Settings > Tools > Claude Code Commit 中配置(Claude CLI 路径、API 地址/密钥、 模型、超时、自定义提示词,以及上述终端选项)。CC 引用与自动打开功能需要启用捆绑的终端插件。 需要 IDE 2025.3.6 或更高版本。
idea-plugin.change-notes: 1.2.0 — Optional setting to auto-close the Terminal tool window when a project opens (independent of commit-message generation; requires the Terminal plugin). Kept in its own group on the settings page. 1.1.0 — Editor popup menu actions "复制 CC 引用" (copies a Claude Code reference, @path#Lstart-end, for the current file and selection) and "发送 CC 引用" (types the reference into the active terminal tab). 1.0.1 — Save API Key in plugin settings. 1.0.0 — Initial release: commit-panel button, Claude CLI integration, tag-based message extraction, customizable prompt.
